# Domain Detection

Recover contiguous spatial domains / layers / niches. Prefer non-oracle *K* estimation in real analyses (`k_policy='estimate'`; see statistical-review).

**20 registered method(s)** in this category.

| Method | Maturity | Implementation | Summary | Guide |
|--------|----------|----------------|---------|-------|
| `bayesspace` | `beta` | `external` | BayesSpace Bayesian spatial clustering (Bioconductor). | [bayesspace](../generated/bayesspace.md) |
| `weave_boundary_aware_domains` | `experimental` | `native` | Domain detection with an adaptive barrier against transcriptomic boundaries. | [weave_boundary_aware_domains](../generated/weave_boundary_aware_domains.md) |
| `weave_multiscale_consensus_domains` | `experimental` | `native` | Consensus domains from expression embeddings smoothed at three spatial scales. | [weave_multiscale_consensus_domains](../generated/weave_multiscale_consensus_domains.md) |
| `weave_topology_regularized_domains` | `experimental` | `native` | Expression domains refined by a spatial graph Potts objective. | [weave_topology_regularized_domains](../generated/weave_topology_regularized_domains.md) |
| `weave_uncertainty_domains` | `experimental` | `native` | Domain labels with per-observation uncertainty from aligned consensus runs. | [weave_uncertainty_domains](../generated/weave_uncertainty_domains.md) |
| `bisecting_kmeans` | `production` | `external` | Bisecting k-means on spatial-PCA embedding. | [bisecting_kmeans](../generated/bisecting_kmeans.md) |
| `dbscan` | `production` | `external` | DBSCAN clustering on PCA + spatial-neighbourhood embedding. | [dbscan](../generated/dbscan.md) |
| `kmeans` | `production` | `native` | PCA + neighbourhood-augmented k-means (BANKSY-style). | [kmeans](../generated/kmeans.md) |
| `mean_shift` | `production` | `external` | Mean Shift density-based clustering (no n_domains required). | [mean_shift](../generated/mean_shift.md) |
| `optics` | `production` | `external` | OPTICS density-based clustering (handles varying density). | [optics](../generated/optics.md) |
| `agglomerative` | `validated` | `external` | Ward hierarchical clustering on spatial-PCA embedding. | [agglomerative](../generated/agglomerative.md) |
| `banksy` | `validated` | `external` | BANKSY neighbourhood-augmented spatial-domain detection. | [banksy](../generated/banksy.md) |
| `banksy_py` | `validated` | `native` | Native-Python BANKSY (own + neighbourhood + azimuthal-gradient features). | [banksy_py](../banksy_py.md) |
| `birch` | `validated` | `external` | BIRCH CF-tree clustering on spatial-PCA embedding. | [birch](../generated/birch.md) |
| `gaussian_mixture` | `validated` | `external` | GMM soft clustering on spatial-PCA embedding. | [gaussian_mixture](../gaussian_mixture.md) |
| `graphst` | `validated` | `external` | GraphST contrastive graph representation + fixed-q clustering. | [graphst](../generated/graphst.md) |
| `minibatch_kmeans` | `validated` | `external` | Mini-batch k-means on spatial-PCA embedding. | [minibatch_kmeans](../generated/minibatch_kmeans.md) |
| `spagcn` | `validated` | `external` | SpaGCN graph-convolutional spatial domains (official package). | [spagcn](../spagcn.md) |
| `spectral` | `validated` | `external` | Spectral clustering on spatial k-NN graph. | [spectral](../spectral.md) |
| `stagate` | `validated` | `external` | STAGATE graph-attention autoencoder + fixed-q clustering. | [stagate](../generated/stagate.md) |

## Decision notes

### `agglomerative`

- Default shortlist for spatial-domain recovery with evidence.
- Ward hierarchical clustering on spatial-PCA embedding.
- Requires external backend(s): `scikit-learn`.
- Full page: [agglomerative](../generated/agglomerative.md)

### `banksy`

- Default shortlist for spatial-domain recovery with evidence.
- BANKSY neighbourhood-augmented spatial-domain detection.
- Requires external backend(s): `Bioconductor::Banksy`.
- Full page: [banksy](../generated/banksy.md)

### `banksy_py`

- Default shortlist for spatial-domain recovery with evidence.
- Native-Python BANKSY (own + neighbourhood + azimuthal-gradient features).
- Full page: [banksy_py](../banksy_py.md)

### `bayesspace`

- Field or SOTA comparator; pin backends and isolated envs.
- BayesSpace Bayesian spatial clustering (Bioconductor).
- SOTA track — fail-closed if the official backend is missing.
- Full page: [bayesspace](../generated/bayesspace.md)

- Default shortlist for spatial-domain recovery with evidence.
